May 31, 2024 Governor Newsom convenes GenAI leaders for landmark summit California Governor Gavin Newsom and leaders representing technology, government, academia, labor, civic organizations and more convened at the Joint California Summit on Generative AI to collaborate on and examine this transformative technology. May 3, 2024 Irene Chen and Preeya Khanna win Google Research Scholar Awards EECS Assistant Professors Irene Chen and Preeya Khanna are recipients of Google Research Scholar Awards. The program aims to support early-career professors and provides recipients with up to $60,000 in funding to support world-class research.
